dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9575 IH: Hold Vandals Accountable Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fallon introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to decrease the sum of damage or attempted damage to property of the United States, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Hold Vandals Accountable Act of 2026.
Section 1361 of title 18, United States Code, is amended by striking $1,000 and inserting $500 each place such term appears.
